durable_improvement: Added a deny-by-default Cloudflare Pages project-identity validator so fresh, structurally valid evidence from another Pages project cannot satisfy C-001.
verification: 5 deterministic Node tests passed; wrong deployment project, wrong alias, mismatched project_name, and malformed expected project were rejected.
remaining: Wire the project-identity verdict into the workflow verification manifest and final acceptance invariant.
Configure CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN in the protected cloudflare-research environment.
Run the deployment workflow and prove resolving URL, served research surface, control-plane project/commit binding, and accepted evidence packet.
handoff: Next Cloudflare run should integrate validate-pages-project-identity.mjs after deployment proof construction and require its valid verdict in build-evidence-verification-input.mjs and build-evidence-acceptance.mjs.
